adjournRequestReceived: We have received your request to adjourn (delay) the court hearing.
setAsideRequestReceived: We have received your request to set aside (cancel) the order.
somethingElseRequestReceived: We have received your request to ask the court to make an order.
youDoNotNeedToDoAnythingElse: You do not need to do anything else. We will send your application to the judge and we will contact you again when they have made a decision.
completeThisShortSurvey: Complete this short survey to help us improve this service (usually takes 5 minutes).

buttons.closeAndReturnToCaseOverview: Close and return to case overview
